name: wf-bugfix-logic
prompt: Read string-helpers-buggy.rkt. It has a bug in `count-words`: empty string returns 1 instead of 0. Fix it so (count-words "") returns 0. Only change the count-words function. Do not modify any other function.
description: Pattern 5: Fix a simple logic bug (off-by-one / wrong condition) — our most common task
